resultCode (== 27 — prompts YesNo then throws TerminateException)

world status (2 bytes — same as v95)

sSPW (PIC) — appended last in v87 0x1D branch

rank buffer 16 bytes: worldRank + worldRankGap + jobRank + jobRankGap — final per-entry field; NO m_bLoginOpt at end of case 0 in v87 (added >v87 in v95; gate MajorVersion()>87 in atlas)

pExceptionObject / result byte — 4th Decode1; NO Decode4(enchantCategory) and NO 2nd result byte. v87 = same 4×Decode1 as v83. enchantCategory+enchantResultFlag are v95+ only.

CUser::OnEmotion._note: In v87 handled inline in CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket case 0xCE: reads Decode4(emotionId) only and calls CAvatar::SetEmotion. No separate OnEmotion function (same as v83). duration and byItemOption are v95+ only.

v9 (pet count; if >0: SetMultiPetInfo reads pets)

mode/sub-op byte (0=drop pick-up, 1=quest record, 2=cash item expire, 3=inc EXP, 4=inc SP, 5=inc fame/POP, 6=inc meso, 7=inc GP, 8=give buff, 9=general item expire, 10=system message, 11=quest record ex, 12=item protect expire, 13=item expire replace, 14=skill expire) — same 15 modes as v95

dr0 (~drInfo[0]) — present in v87, same as v95

CMob::GenerateMovePath.notes: Opcode 0xC8. v87 wire shape matches v95 / JMS-v185 — the `(GMS && >83) || JMS` gates open the multiTargetForBall and randTimeForAreaAttack count+loop blocks, the hackedCodeCRC field between flyCtxTargetY and the Flush body, and the post-Flush bChasing/hasTarget/bChasing2/bChasingHack/tChaseDuration tail. Decompile cross-check at GMSv87_4GB.exe:0x6a6381 confirms COutPacket(0xC8) → Encode4 mobId → Encode2 ctrlSN+1 → Encode1 packed flags → Encode1 actionType → Encode4 skill m_Data → Encode4 multiTargetForBall count + 2×Encode4 per entry → Encode4 randTimeForAreaAttack count + 1×Encode4 per entry → Encode1 state → Encode4 hackedCode → Encode4 flyCtxTargetX → Encode4 flyCtxTargetY → Encode4 hackedCodeCRC → CMovePath::Flush → Encode1 bChasing → Encode1 hasTarget → Encode1 bChasing2 → Encode1 bChasingHack → Encode4 tChaseDuration.
